# Items removed from icudt76l.dat before it is embedded, one Python regex per
# line (matched with re.search against the full item name, e.g.
# "icudt76l/curr/en.res"). See filter_dat.py.
#
# The rule for adding a line: GoogleSQL must have no runtime path that reads
# the data, and the compliance + string/collation/normalize/timestamp suites
# must still pass against a shim built with it removed. Everything kept below
# the cut -- collation tailorings (coll/), normalization (*.nrm), character
# properties, the base collation (ucadata), break iteration (brkitr/) and the
# timezone *rules* (zoneinfo64/metaZones/... which live at the root, not under
# zone/) -- is data those functions actually touch, so it stays.

# Legacy charset converters. BigQuery/GoogleSQL exposes no CONVERT-with-
# encoding surface; UTF-8/UTF-16 handling is in the icuuc code, not this data.
# (The cnvalias.icu alias table is left in place -- tiny, and the converter
# subsystem may touch it at init.)
/[^/]*\.cnv$

# Per-locale display-name trees: currency names, language names, region
# names, measurement-unit names. Used by locale-aware *formatting* of those
# entities, which BigQuery has no function for.
^icudt76l/curr/
^icudt76l/lang/
^icudt76l/region/
^icudt76l/unit/

# Rule-based number formatting (spelling numbers as words) and script
# transliteration: no BigQuery surface.
^icudt76l/rbnf/
^icudt76l/translit/
